datasets.name: CICIDS2017
datasets.role: Labelled web brute-force evaluation and supervised comparison
datasets.limitations: Network-flow labels, not application login outcomes. Protocol and destination port are retained as proxy context; no user-agent, country, or credential-success field exists.

datasets.name: LANL Unified Host and Network Dataset (2017)
datasets.limitations: Official daily files require registration. It supplies real enterprise host-event authentication data but does not provide credential-stuffing labels.

dataset.training_note: Metrics are reported against CICIDS2017 web brute-force labels. They are an intrusion detection benchmark, not a claim of real-world web credential-stuffing accuracy.

evaluation.split: Stratified 80/20 split with fixed random seed 42.
evaluation.feature_note: Native CICIDS2017 flow attributes: destination_port, flow_duration, total_fwd_packets, total_backward_packets, total_fwd_bytes, total_backward_bytes, flow_bytes_per_second, flow_packets_per_second, syn_flag_count, ack_flag_count, fwd_iat_mean, bwd_iat_mean.
